TransportDesEleves.question: Distance traveled by students to reach the institution

TransportDuPersonnel.question: Distance traveled by staff to reach the institution

EquipementsDivers.question: Your school likely has one or more boilers for heating. To operate, these devices can use various types of fossil fuels (fuel oil, natural gas, etc.). Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions generated by this equipment are released during the combustion of fuel oil or gas, for example.
